title: Dead Sea Scrolls source of information
display_title: Dead Sea Scrolls source of information
wikitext:
[]: Dead Sea Scrolls - source of information?             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Apr 12, 2011 2:46 am Well yeah... I don't remember seeing much discussion about the DSS. I guess we all know that the Dead See Scrolls were sent to Earth from the FAR, at least in the NGE canon. Just where did they get their knowledge from? Are these prophecies? Because they are very detailed... Just one thought - what if they are memories? From a previous iteration? How else could the writers of the DSS know what will happen? *duck, run, cover* Discuss!

[]: Re: Dead Sea Scrolls - source of information?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 12, 2011 4:24 am qu4d wrote: Just one thought - what if they are memories? From a previous iteration? How else could the writers of the DSS know what will happen?

I guess we all know that the Dead See Scrolls were sent to Earth from the FAR, at least in the NGE canon. Just where did they get their knowledge from? Are these prophecies?
